text:
llows :
The Sun—Mostly pitta (bile) and a little of vatha
(wind).
The Moon—Mostly vatha (wind) and a little of kapha
(phlegm).
Mars—Pitta (bile).
Mercury—Mostly vatha (wind), a little of pitta (bile)
and still less of kapha (phlegm).

264 How to Judge a Horoscope
Jupiter—More of kapha (phlegm) and a little of vatha
(wind).
Venus—More of vatha (wind) and a little of kapha
(phlegm).
Saturn—More of vatha (wind) and a little pitta (bile).
Examine carefully the horoscope. If the Sun and Mars
occupy evil places, diseases by pitta (extreme heat, etc.),
can be seen. The Moon and Venus if evil by position bring
in diseases caused by water such as swelling, dropsy, water
in the head, etc. Saturn brings about diseases pertaining to
vatha or wind. Mercury causes brain-fever, typhoid and the
like. Jupiter causes deafness. The diseases will make their
appearance during the seasons indicated by the planets
which are follows :—
Planet Season English Equivalent
Venus Vasantha Spring
